name: Cobblemon additions
description: A Mod that adds villages with Pokemon Village/City variants - Originally made for the Brocraft server. This will spawn in a variety of structures within the villages as well.
description_pt_br: Mod que adiciona vilas com variantes de Vilas/Cidades Pokémon — criado originalmente para o servidor Brocraft. Gera diversas estruturas dentro das aldeias.
